backgrounds.name: Acolyte
backgrounds.description: You have spent your life in the service of a temple to a specific god or pantheon of gods, learning the rites and prayers of your order.
backgrounds.feature_desc: You command respect from those who share your faith. You and your companions can receive free healing at temples of your faith, and you can receive shelter from fellow worshippers.
personality_traits: I idolize a hero of my faith.
I see omens in every event and action.
bonds: I would die to recover an ancient relic of my faith.
flaws: I judge others harshly, and myself even more severely.

backgrounds.name: Charlatan
backgrounds.description: You have always had a way with people. You know what makes them tick, you can tease out their desires after a few minutes of conversation, and with a few leading questions you can read them like cheap novels.
equipment: Tools of the con (weighted dice or marked cards)
backgrounds.feature_desc: You have created a second identity including documentation, established acquaintances, and disguises that allow you to assume that persona. Additionally, you can forge documents.
personality_traits: I fall in and out of love easily.
I have a joke for every occasion.
bonds: I fleeced the wrong person and must work to ensure that they never find me.
flaws: I can't resist a pretty face.
I'm a born gambler who can't resist a wager.

backgrounds.name: Criminal
backgrounds.description: You are an experienced criminal with a history of breaking the law. You have spent a lot of time among other criminals and still have contacts within the criminal underworld.
backgrounds.feature_desc: You have a reliable and trustworthy contact who acts as your liaison to a network of other criminals. You know how to get messages to and from your contact.
personality_traits: I always have a plan for when things go wrong.
I am always calm, no matter the situation.
bonds: I'm trying to pay off an old debt I owe to a generous benefactor.
flaws: When I see something valuable, I can't think about anything but how to steal it.

backgrounds.name: Entertainer
backgrounds.description: You thrive in front of an audience. You know how to entrance them, entertain them, and even inspire them. Your poetics can stir the hearts of those who hear you, awakening grief or joy, laughter or anger.
backgrounds.feature_desc: You can always find a place to perform. Your performance makes you something of a local figure. The common folk love you, and you can find a place to sleep and simple food for free at any place that has entertainment.
personality_traits: I know a story relevant to almost every situation.
Whenever I come to a new place, I collect local rumors.
bonds: My instrument is my most treasured possession.
flaws: I'll do anything to win fame and renown.
I'm a sucker for a pretty face.

backgrounds.name: Folk Hero
backgrounds.description: You come from a humble social rank, but you are destined for so much more. Already the people of your home village regard you as their champion.
backgrounds.feature_desc: Since you come from the ranks of the common folk, you fit in among them with ease. You can find a place to hide, rest, or recuperate among commoners, unless you have shown yourself to be a danger to them.
personality_traits: I judge people by their actions, not their words.
If someone is in trouble, I'm always ready to lend help.
bonds: I protect those who cannot protect themselves.
flaws: The tyrant who rules my land will stop at nothing to see me killed.

backgrounds.name: Guild Artisan
backgrounds.description: You are a member of an artisan's guild, skilled in a particular field and closely associated with other artisans.
backgrounds.feature_desc: Fellow guild members will provide you with lodging and food if necessary, and pay for your funeral if needed. In some cities and towns, a guild hall offers a central place to meet other members.
personality_traits: I believe that anything worth doing is worth doing right.
I'm rude to people who lack my commitment to hard work.
bonds: The workshop where I learned my trade is the most important place in the world to me.
flaws: I'll do anything to get my hands on something rare or priceless.

backgrounds.name: Hermit
backgrounds.description: You lived in seclusion—either in a sheltered community such as a monastery, or entirely alone—for a formative part of your life.
backgrounds.feature_desc: The quiet seclusion of your extended hermitage gave you access to a unique and powerful discovery. The exact nature of this revelation depends on the nature of your seclusion.
personality_traits: I've been isolated so long that I rarely speak, preferring gestures and expressions.
I am utterly serene, even in the face of disaster.
bonds: I entered seclusion to hide from the ones who might still be hunting me.
flaws: Now that I've returned to the world, I enjoy its delights a little too much.

backgrounds.name: Noble
backgrounds.description: You understand wealth, power, and privilege. You carry a noble title, and your family owns land, collects taxes, and wields significant political influence.
backgrounds.feature_desc: Thanks to your noble birth, people are inclined to think the best of you. You are welcome in high society, and people assume you have the right to be wherever you are.
personality_traits: My eloquent flattery makes everyone feel like the most wonderful person in the world.
I take great pains to always look my best.
bonds: I will face any challenge to win the approval of my family.
flaws: I secretly believe everyone is beneath me.

backgrounds.name: Outlander
backgrounds.description: You grew up in the wilds, far from civilization and the comforts of town and technology.
backgrounds.feature_desc: You have an excellent memory for maps and geography, and can always recall the general layout of terrain, settlements, and other features. You can also find food and fresh water for yourself and up to five others each day.
personality_traits: I'm driven by a wanderlust that led me away from home.
I watch over my friends as if they were a litter of newborn pups.
bonds: My family, clan, or tribe is the most important thing in my life.
flaws: I am too enamored of ale, wine, and other intoxicants.

backgrounds.name: Sage
backgrounds.description: You spent years learning the lore of the multiverse. You scoured manuscripts, studied scrolls, and listened to the greatest experts on the subjects that interest you.
backgrounds.feature_desc: When you attempt to learn or recall a piece of lore, if you do not know that information, you often know where and from whom you can obtain it.
personality_traits: I use polysyllabic words that convey the impression of great erudition.
I've read every book in the world's greatest libraries.
bonds: I have an ancient text that holds terrible secrets that must not fall into the wrong hands.
flaws: I overlook obvious solutions in favor of complicated ones.

backgrounds.name: Sailor
backgrounds.description: You sailed on a seagoing vessel for years. In that time, you faced down mighty storms, monsters of the deep, and those who wanted to sink your craft to the bottomless depths.
backgrounds.feature_desc: When you need to, you can secure free passage on a sailing ship for yourself and your companions. You might sail on the ship you served on, or another ship you have good relations with.
personality_traits: My friends know they can rely on me no matter what.
I work hard so that I can play hard when the work is done.
bonds: I'm loyal to my captain first, everything else second.
flaws: I follow orders, even if I think they're wrong.

backgrounds.name: Soldier
backgrounds.description: War has been your life for as long as you care to remember. You trained as a youth, studied the use of weapons and armor, learned basic survival techniques.
equipment: Deck of cards or dice set
backgrounds.feature_desc: You have a military rank from your career as a soldier. Soldiers loyal to your former military organization still recognize your authority and influence.
personality_traits: I'm always polite and respectful.
I'm haunted by memories of war.
bonds: I would still lay down my life for the people I served with.
flaws: The monstrous enemy we faced still leaves me quivering with fear.

backgrounds.name: Urchin
backgrounds.description: You grew up on the streets alone, orphaned, and poor. You had no one to watch over you or to provide for you, so you learned to provide for yourself.
equipment: Map of city you grew up in
backgrounds.feature_desc: You know the secret patterns and flows of cities and can find passage through the urban sprawl that others would miss. You can find a path between any two locations twice as fast as normal.
personality_traits: I hide scraps of food and trinkets away in my pockets.
I ask a lot of questions.
bonds: My town or city is my home, and I'll fight to defend it.
flaws: It's not stealing if I need it more than someone else.

backgrounds.name: Anthropologist
backgrounds.description: You have always been fascinated by other cultures, from the most ancient and primeval lost lands to the most modern civilizations. By studying other cultures' customs, philosophies, laws, rituals, religious beliefs, and languages, you have learned how to get along in a world filled with very different kinds of people.
backgrounds.feature_desc: You can communicate with humanoids who don't speak any language you know. You must observe them for at least 1 day, after which you learn enough of their language to communicate with them.
personality_traits: I prefer the company of those who aren't like me.
I'm a stickler when it comes to observing proper etiquette and local customs.
bonds: I will complete my research even if it kills me.
flaws: I stand by my family even when they are wrong.

backgrounds.name: Archaeologist
backgrounds.description: An archaeologist learns about the long-lost and fallen cultures of the past by studying their remains—their bones, their ruins, their surviving masterworks, and their tombs.
backgrounds.feature_desc: When you enter a ruin or dungeon, you can correctly ascertain its original purpose and determine its builders, whether it is a dwarven mine, an elven safe house, a tomb, a temple, or a city.
personality_traits: I love a good puzzle or mystery.
I'm happier in a dusty old ruin than in a palace.
bonds: I want to find the lost city of my mentor's research.
flaws: I have a hard time resisting the temptation to pocket shiny objects.

backgrounds.name: City Watch
backgrounds.description: You have served the community where you grew up, standing as its first line of defense against crime. You aren't a soldier, directing your gaze outward at possible enemies. Instead, your service to your hometown was to help police its populace.
equipment: Horn you can use to summon help
backgrounds.feature_desc: Your experience in enforcing the law, and dealing with lawbreakers, gives you a feel for local laws and criminals. You can easily find the local outpost of the watch or a similar organization.
personality_traits: I'm always polite and respectful.
I'm haunted by memories of war. I don't talk about it.
bonds: I worked with a local militia to investigate a crime that was never solved.
flaws: The monstrous enemy we faced still leaves me quivering with fear.

backgrounds.name: Clan Crafter
backgrounds.description: The Stout Folk are well known for their artisanship and the worth of their handiworks, and you have been trained in that ancient tradition. For years you labored under a dwarf master of the craft.
backgrounds.feature_desc: As well respected as clan crafters are among outsiders, no one esteems them quite so highly as dwarves do. You always have free room and board in any place where shield dwarves or gold dwarves dwell.
personality_traits: I believe that anything worth doing is worth doing right.
I'm rude to people who lack my commitment to hard work and fair play.
bonds: I pursue wealth to secure someone's love.
flaws: I'll do anything to get my hands on something rare or priceless.

backgrounds.name: Cloistered Scholar
backgrounds.description: As a child, you were inquisitive when your playmates were possessive or raucous. In your formative years, you found your way to one of the great institutes of learning.
equipment: Borrowed book on your current area of study
backgrounds.feature_desc: Though others must often endure extensive interviews and significant fees to gain access to even the most common archives in your library, you have free access to the majority of the library.
personality_traits: I use polysyllabic words that convey the impression of great erudition.
I've read every book in the world's greatest libraries—or I like to boast that I have.
bonds: I have a mentor whose teachings I still follow.
flaws: Most people scream and run when they see a demon. I stop and take notes on its anatomy.

backgrounds.name: Courtier
backgrounds.description: In your earlier years, you were trained in the art of the court, under the tutelage of a guildmaster or other official in the service of a noble house.
backgrounds.feature_desc: Your knowledge of how bureaucracies function lets you gain access to the records and inner workings of any noble court or government you encounter. You know who the movers and shakers are.
personality_traits: I believe that anything worth doing is worth doing right.
I'm always the smartest person in the room.
bonds: I will do whatever it takes to protect my institution.
flaws: I have a weakness for the vices of the city, especially fine food and drink.

backgrounds.name: Faction Agent
backgrounds.description: Many organizations active in the North and across the face of Faerûn aren't bound by strictures of geography. These factions pursue their agendas without regard for political boundaries.
backgrounds.feature_desc: As a faction agent, you have access to a secret network of supporters and operatives who can provide assistance on your adventures. You know a set of secret signs and passwords you can use to identify such operatives.
personality_traits: I idolize a particular hero of my faction.
I can stare down a hell hound without flinching.
bonds: Everything I do is for the common people.
flaws: I judge others harshly, and myself even more severely.

backgrounds.name: Far Traveler
backgrounds.description: Almost all of the common people and other folk that one might encounter have one thing in common: they live out their lives without ever traveling more than a few miles from where they were born. You are not one of those folk.
tool_proficiencies: One musical instrument or gaming set
equipment: One musical instrument or gaming set
Small piece of jewelry worth 10 gp
backgrounds.feature_desc: Your accent, mannerisms, figures of speech, and perhaps even your appearance all mark you as foreign. Curious glances are directed your way wherever you go. Nobles, scholars, and merchants may be interested in where you came from and what you know.
personality_traits: I have different assumptions from those around me.
I have a strong code of honor or sense of propriety from my place of origin.
bonds: So long as I have this token from my homeland, I can face any adversity.
flaws: I am secretly (or not so secretly) convinced of the superiority of my home culture.

backgrounds.name: Haunted One
backgrounds.description: You are haunted by something so terrible that you dare not speak of it. You've tried to bury it and run away from it, to no avail. Whatever this thing is that haunts you can yet be redeemed.
backgrounds.feature_desc: Those who look into your eyes can see that you have faced unimaginable horror and that you are no stranger to darkness. Commoners make every effort to help you. They will take you in, feed you, and hide you.
personality_traits: I don't run from evil. Evil runs from me.
I like to read and memorize poetry.
ideals: I try to help those in need.
I'll stop the threat, no matter the cost.
bonds: I keep my thoughts and feelings to myself.
flaws: I talk to spirits that no one else can see.

backgrounds.name: Inheritor
backgrounds.description: You are the heir to something of great value—not just in monetary terms, but something that has always been in your family. It could be a holy relic, an object with a terrible history, or something that no one else knows about.
tool_proficiencies: One musical instrument or gaming set
backgrounds.feature_desc: You have an inheritance that others might desire. The exact nature of your inheritance and how it affects your adventures is something to determine with your DM.
personality_traits: I have a strong sense of fair play.
I'm always picking things up, absently fiddling with them.
bonds: My inheritance is tied to a terrible power.
flaws: I have difficulty trusting in my allies.

backgrounds.name: Investigator
backgrounds.description: Rarer than watch or patrol members are a community's investigators, who are responsible for solving crimes after the fact. As an investigator, you have the knowledge to piece together clues from the scene of a crime.
backgrounds.feature_desc: Your experience in enforcing the law, and dealing with lawbreakers, gives you a feel for local laws and criminals. You can easily find the local outpost of the watch or a similar organization.
personality_traits: I am a consummate professional.
I like figuring out how things work.
bonds: I'm still searching for a criminal who wronged me long ago.
flaws: I am too invested in my work to maintain healthy relationships.

backgrounds.name: Knight of the Order
backgrounds.description: You belong to an order of knights who have sworn oaths to achieve a certain goal. The nature of this goal depends on the order you serve, but in your eyes it is without question a vital and honorable endeavor.
backgrounds.feature_desc: You receive shelter and succor from members of your knightly order and those who are sympathetic to its aims. If your order is a religious one, you can gain aid from temples and other religious communities.
personality_traits: I'm always polite and respectful.
I'm confident in my own abilities.
bonds: I owe my life to the knight who took me in as an orphan.
flaws: I made a terrible mistake in battle. I live with the guilt.

backgrounds.name: Mercenary Veteran
backgrounds.description: As a sell-sword who fought battles for coin, you're well acquainted with risking life and limb for a chance at a share of treasure. Now you look for something else, perhaps greater glory, or a cause worth fighting for.
backgrounds.feature_desc: You know the mercenary life as only someone who has experienced it can. You are able to identify mercenary companies by their emblems, and you know a little about any such company including reputation and fees.
personality_traits: I enjoy being strong and like breaking things.
I have a crude sense of humor.
bonds: My honor is my life.
flaws: I made a terrible mistake in battle cost many lives—and I would do anything to keep that secret.

backgrounds.name: Knight (Noble Variant)
backgrounds.description: A variant of the Noble background for those who have sworn to serve a liege lord. You hold a title and a place in the landed gentry, and your family has owned land and wielded influence for generations.
backgrounds.feature_desc: You have the service of three retainers loyal to your family. These retainers are commoners who can perform mundane tasks. They are not combatants and won't accompany you into dangerous areas.
personality_traits: My favor, once lost, is lost forever.
I take great pains to always look my best.
bonds: I will face any challenge to win the approval of my family.
flaws: I secretly believe that everyone is beneath me.

backgrounds.name: Pirate
backgrounds.description: A variant of the Sailor background. You spent your early years as a pirate, plundering trade routes and threatening those who didn't offer enough gold.
backgrounds.feature_desc: No matter where you go, people are afraid of you due to your pirate reputation. You can get away with minor criminal offenses in most ports of call, as people are afraid to turn you in to authorities.
personality_traits: My friends know they can rely on me.
I work hard so that I can play hard.
bonds: I'm loyal to my captain first, everything else second.
flaws: Once someone questions my courage, I never back down.

backgrounds.name: Rewarded
backgrounds.description: You were chosen by a deity, a cosmic force, or a being of great power for reasons you may not entirely understand. Perhaps you rescued a celestial messenger, or your heroics in an otherwise mundane situation attracted divine attention.
equipment: A device of import to your patron (trinket)
backgrounds.feature_desc: Once per day, you can receive one point of inspiration without any roleplay requirement, simply due to the cosmic attention paid to your deeds.
personality_traits: I feel compelled to fulfill the expectations of my benefactor.
I try not to let my good fortune make me arrogant.
bonds: I owe everything to whoever gave me this gift.
flaws: I have trouble believing anything truly bad can happen to me.

backgrounds.name: Ruined
backgrounds.description: Everything was taken from you. Your family name, your wealth, your reputation—all of it is gone. Whether the ruin came from enemy action, your own failures, or cruel fate, you now have nothing but the skills you carry.
backgrounds.feature_desc: You have survived when others would not. You can always find the basic necessities—enough food and shelter to get by—among the destitute and desperate.
personality_traits: I try not to let my former wealth influence my opinion of others.
I have very few possessions, and I treasure those I do have.
bonds: I lost someone dear to me. I will not rest until I know what happened.
flaws: I dwell too much on what I once had.

backgrounds.name: Shipwright
backgrounds.description: Your hands know the feel of a wooden hull, and your mind understands the rigging of a sailing ship better than most. You have spent years constructing and repairing seafaring vessels.
backgrounds.feature_desc: Provided you have carpenter's tools and wood, you can make temporary repairs to a water vehicle. A vehicle you work on for 1 minute can move (at reduced speed) even if it has taken structural damage.
personality_traits: I voice my opinion loudly.
I appreciate the craftsmanship in every tool or ship.
bonds: I have a debt to pay to someone who saved my life.
flaws: My tools are more important to me than people.

backgrounds.name: Smuggler
backgrounds.description: On the surface, you were a legitimate merchant. Secretly, however, you made your true profits by smuggling illegal goods past inspectors and patrols.
equipment: Fancy leather vest or vest of pockets
backgrounds.feature_desc: You are acquainted with a network of smugglers who are willing to help you move things across a city or region, whether those things are goods, people, or information.
personality_traits: I prefer to keep a low profile.
I'm always scanning the environment for potential threats or escape routes.
bonds: My crew stuck with me through hard times. I'll do the same for them.
flaws: I'm greedy. I'll take any opportunity to score extra coin.

backgrounds.name: Stojanow Prisoner
backgrounds.description: You were captured and imprisoned in the dungeons beneath Phlan. Through strength of will—or just dumb luck—you escaped, but the experience left its mark on you.
equipment: A trinket from before your imprisonment
backgrounds.feature_desc: You spent time locked up with some of the worst criminals in the region. You have connections in the criminal underworld—enough to find a fence, a forger, or an assassin for hire.
personality_traits: I am always looking for the exits.
I don't like to talk about my time in prison.
bonds: I will do anything to avoid going back to prison.
flaws: I have trouble trusting anyone fully.

backgrounds.name: Witchlight Hand
backgrounds.description: You work for the Witchlight Carnival, one of the wonders of the multiverse. You might be a performer, a carnival worker, or just someone who stowed away and never left.
backgrounds.feature_desc: The carnival is your home. You can always find food and shelter at the carnival, and the performers and workers treat you like family. The carnival also provides a ready-made cover for clandestine activities.
personality_traits: I love the magic of the carnival.
I'm always looking for the next great adventure.
bonds: The carnival family is my real family.
flaws: I never stay in one place for long.
